chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.547 of 2024 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Khalid Hussain Shahani Applicant:- The State/ANF through Mr. Mohsin Ali Khan, Special Prosecutor, ANF. Respondent:- Syed Tahir Hussain through Ms. Palwasha Tareen, advocate. Date of hearing:- 01.04.2026 =============== MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: ANF has challenged impugned order dated 05.12.2023, whereby on medical ground bail was granted to respondent, accused of possessing 3020 Xanax tablets which is said to be a scheduled offence under CNS Act 1997. 2. We have heard the parties. Prima facie the impugned order does not appear to be sustainable as without referring the accused to a medical board to ascertain the fact whether his incarceration in jail was detrimental to his health or not, the trial Court considered some unauthenticated ECG report of the respondent and granted him bail. But since meanwhile much water has flown from under the bridges and the entire trial has been completed, as it is stated to be posted for statement of accused, we instead of cancelling the bail of respondent would like to give direction to trial Court to conclude the case and announce the judgment within a period of one month and submit compliance report. The Cr. Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
